result.stdout:
scriptdb
  scriptdb command can be used to script database objects

Usage:
  scriptdb [options]

Options:
  -c, -cs, --connectionString <connectionString> (REQUIRED)                       provide a connection string
  -t, --includeTables, --tables                                                   include tables in the generated scripts [default: False]
  -procs, -sp, -sps, --includeStoredProcedures, --storeprocs                      include stored procedures in the generated scripts [default: False]
  -vw, -vws, --includeViews, --views                                              include views in the generated scripts [default: False]
  -udf, -udfs, --functions, --includeFunctions                                    include functions in the generated scripts [default: False]
  -datatypes, -udt, -udts, --includeUserDefinedDataTypes, --userdefineddatatypes  include user defined data types in the generated scripts [default: False]
  -ix, -ixs, --includeIndexes, --indexes                                          include indexes in the generated scripts [default: False]
  -tr, -trs, --includeTriggers, --triggers                                        include triggers in the generated scripts [default: False]
  -folder, -path, --scriptsfolder <scriptsfolder> (REQUIRED)                      scripts output folder--folder will be cleared when generating the scripts
  --version                                                                       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                                                                  Show help and usage information
